(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Supplemental Interrogatories, Demand For Documents And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Christopher Farris' motion to compel further responses to supplemental interrogatories and request for production of documents is denied pursuant to CCP Section 2030.300 and 2030.310. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Supplemental Interrogatories, Demand For Documents And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-21-2008 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2008 Set For Trial On Dec-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Specially Prepared Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff CityBank N. A.'s motion to compel further response to special interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $312.50 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
